runtime_restrictions: age encryption accepts only native age and ssh-ed25519 key material
ssh-rsa recipients and identities are rejected before age parsing
the Rust engine exposes no network listener and its staged container has network disabled

exceptions.rationale: age 0.12.1 compiles RSA as part of SSH support and unifies that feature onto Janus's algorithm-inspection use of ssh-key, but Janus accepts only ssh-ed25519 and native age material; the vulnerable RSA operation is unreachable and no remote timing oracle exists.
This compile-time-only macro is retained by age 0.12.1 through i18n-embed-fl and is absent from the runtime image as a library or executable.
The yanked version is selected only by age's RSA dependency graph; it has no RustSec vulnerability and remains bounded by the same unreachable-RSA restrictions.
